---
title: "Contributing"
---

## Ways to contribute

Contributions are welcome from R users, developers, and researchers.

You can contribute by:

- Reporting bugs (with reproducible examples)
- Improving documentation and examples
- Adding tests
- Adding new calendar entities / helper functions
- Creating vignettes that demonstrate real analyses

## Where to contribute

- Repository: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime)
- Issues: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues)

## Reporting a bug (checklist)

Please include:

1. What you expected to happen
2. What actually happened
3. A minimal reproducible example (code + inputs)
4. Location inputs: latitude, longitude, timezone offset
5. Output of `sessionInfo()`

## Development principles

- Keep computations reproducible (explicit timezone/location)
- Prefer clear return formats and documented units
- Add tests for edge cases (skipped/leap entities, midnight-crossing end times)

## Funding acknowledgement

Early development of this package was funded through **Google Summer of Code (GSoC)** in multiple years.
